issue.message: Use of LayoutInflater.from(Context) detected. Consider using layoutInflater instead
WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE no longer provides write access when targeting Android 10, unless you use `requestLegacyExternalStorage`
Suspicious indentation: This is indented but is not continuing the previous expression (`val selectedBgColor `...)
Suspicious indentation: This is indented but is not continuing the previous expression (`supportActionBar?.ti`...)
Suspicious indentation: This is indented but is not continuing the previous expression (`val storedFiles = fi`...)
issue.errorLine1: Log.d("MainActivity", "存储中找到 ${storedFiles.size} 个文件")

issue.message: Suspicious indentation: This is indented but is not continuing the previous expression (`files[fileName] = fi`...)
Suspicious indentation: This is indented but is not continuing the previous expression (`val newDeletedFiles `...)
Attribute `enableOnBackInvokedCallback` is only used in API level 33 and higher (current min is 31)
Found dynamic locale changes, but did not find corresponding Play Core library calls for downloading languages and splitting by language is not disabled in the `bundle` configuration

Calling detach() and attach() in the same FragmentTransaction is a no-op, meaning it does not recreate the Fragment's view. If you would like the view to be recreated, separate these operations into separate transactions.

Calling detach() and attach() in the same FragmentTransaction is a no-op, meaning it does not recreate the Fragment's view. If you would like the view to be recreated, separate these operations into separate transactions.
Your app is currently not handling Selected Photos Access introduced in Android 14+
Your app is currently not handling Selected Photos Access introduced in Android 14+

Formatting %d followed by words ("seconds"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.

Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 29
Unnecessary; `Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.Q` is always true here (`SDK_INT` ≥ 29 and < 33)
Unnecessary; `Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.Q` is always true here (`SDK_INT` ≥ 29 and < 33)
This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 29. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.

Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
issue.errorLine1: holder.fileName.text = "$fileName*" // 添加星号表示仅保存在临时目录

issue.message: Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
Number formatting does not take into account locale settings. Consider using `String.format` instead.
